text: What's a Directory? @ essemanaio. @ s e Stores objects (e.g. Users, Groups, Computers, Servers, File Shares) with a structure (domain/tree) ¢ Multiple trees can be grouped into a forest e Commonly used in Windows Environments.. ¢ Sign-in to multiple devices with the same username/password provides centralised management for assets ¢ ... Microsoft Active Directory Domain Services (AD DS) ¢ AD DS most popular, open-source alternatives (SAMBA)
